allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(forms\): add indeterminate state, form participation, and group syncing to checkbox components

Upgrade checkbox with indeterminate \(tri-state\) support, hint rendering,
aria-checked, civ-input event, and defaultChecked-based form reset.
Rewrite checkbox-group to extend CivFormElement with name/disabled/tile
syncing, comma-separated value tracking, orientation, and formResetCallback.
Update React Native Checkbox with indeterminate visual and hint accessibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
